mapper.sql: rd.demand_code, rd.dept_name, rd.office_name, rd.team, rd.dept_id, rd.demand_class, rd.past_quantity, rd.current_status, rd.recruitment_source, rd.demand_reason, rd.demand_by, rd.repeal_flag, rd.repeal_date, rd.repeal_reason, rd.approval_result, rd.oa_order, rd.approval_date, rd.demand_status, rd.status_describes, rd.re_remake, rd.enabled_flag, rd.demand_reason_type, rd.real_demand_status, rd.id, rd.create_time, rd.create_by, rd.update_time, rd.update_by, rd.current_node, rd.current_person, rd.number, rd.dept_first_count, rd.dept_second_count, rd.dept_third_count, rd.dept_current_count, rd.temp_begin_date, rd.temp_end_date, rd.after_complete_edit_flag,rd.agree_num

${tAlias}.demand_code as ${tAlias}_demand_code, ${tAlias}.dept_name as ${tAlias}_dept_name, ${tAlias}.office_name as ${tAlias}_office_name, ${tAlias}.team as ${tAlias}_team, ${tAlias}.dept_id as ${tAlias}_dept_id, ${tAlias}.demand_class as ${tAlias}_demand_class, ${tAlias}.past_quantity as ${tAlias}_past_quantity, ${tAlias}.current_status as ${tAlias}_current_status, ${tAlias}.recruitment_source as ${tAlias}_recruitment_source, ${tAlias}.demand_reason as ${tAlias}_demand_reason, ${tAlias}.demand_by as ${tAlias}_demand_by, ${tAlias}.repeal_flag as ${tAlias}_repeal_flag, ${tAlias}.repeal_date as ${tAlias}_repeal_date, ${tAlias}.repeal_reason as ${tAlias}_repeal_reason, ${tAlias}.approval_result as ${tAlias}_approval_result, ${tAlias}.oa_order as ${tAlias}_oa_order, ${tAlias}.approval_date as ${tAlias}_approval_date, ${tAlias}.demand_status as ${tAlias}_demand_status, ${tAlias}.status_describes as ${tAlias}_status_describes, ${tAlias}.re_remake as ${tAlias}_re_remake, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.demand_reason_type as ${tAlias}_demand_reason_type, ${tAlias}.real_demand_status as ${tAlias}_real_demand_status, ${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by, ${tAlias}.current_node as ${tAlias}_current_node, ${tAlias}.number as ${tAlias}_number, ${tAlias}.dept_first_count as ${tAlias}_dept_first_count, ${tAlias}.dept_second_count as ${tAlias}_dept_second_count, ${tAlias}.dept_third_count as ${tAlias}_dept_third_count, ${tAlias}.dept_current_count as ${tAlias}_dept_current_count, ${tAlias}.agree_num as ${tAlias}_agree_num, ${tAlias}.temp_begin_date as ${tAlias}_temp_begin_date, ${tAlias}.temp_end_date as ${tAlias}_temp_end_date, ${tAlias}.after_complete_edit_flag as ${tAlias}_after_complete_edit_flag

select
, pe.name as demand_by_str, ( SELECT CASE WHEN EXISTS (select 1 from re_demand_job rdj where rdj.demand_id = rd.id and rd.enabled_flag = 1 and rdj.need_flag = 1 ) then 1 else 0 end ) AS have_sub_need_flag, case when exists (select 1 from re_demand_job rdj where rdj.demand_id = rd.id and rdj.enabled_flag = 1 and isnull(rdj.pass_quantity, 0) < rdj.quantity) then 0 else 1 end as all_pass_flag, case when exists (select 1 from re_demand rdt where rdt.id = rd.id and left(rdt.demand_code, 1) = 'L' and rdt.real_demand_status = 'complete' and getdate() <= rdt.temp_end_date) then 1 else 0 end as temp_work_flag, (select sum( isnull(rdj.agree_num,0) ) - SUM( isnull(pass_quantity,0) ) from re_demand rd2 join re_demand_job rdj on rd2.id = rdj.demand_id where rdj.enabled_flag = 1 -- (select rd2.agree_num - (select SUM( isnull(pass_quantity,0) ) from re_demand_job where enabled_flag = 1 and demand_id= rd2.id GROUP BY demand_id) -- from re_demand rd2 and rd2.demand_code = rd.demand_code and rd2.enabled_flag=1) as residual_demand from re_demand rd join pm_employee pe on pe.id = rd.demand_by and pe.enabled_flag = 1
mapper.insert:
insert into re_demand (current_node,demand_code, dept_id, demand_class, past_quantity, current_status, recruitment_source, demand_reason, repeal_flag, repeal_date, repeal_reason, approval_result, oa_order, approval_date, demand_status, status_describes, re_remake, enabled_flag, demand_reason_type, real_demand_status, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by, dept_name, office_name, team, demand_by, number, dept_first_count, dept_second_count, dept_third_count, dept_current_count, temp_begin_date, temp_end_date, after_complete_edit_flag,agree_num
) select #{currentNode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{demandCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deptId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{demandClass,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pastQuantity,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{currentStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{recruitmentSource,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{demandReason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{repealFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{repealDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{repealReason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{approvalResult,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{oaOrder,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{approvalDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{demandStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{statusDescribes,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reRemake,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{demandReasonType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{realDemandStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, (select temp.dept_name from fnd_dept temp where fd.ext_dept_id = temp.id) as dept_name, (select temp.dept_name from fnd_dept temp where fd.ext_department_id = temp.id) as depart_name, (select temp.dept_name from fnd_dept temp where fd.ext_team_id = temp.id) as team, (select top 1 pe.id from fnd_user fu join pm_employee pe on fu.id = #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} and fu.employee_id = pe.id where pe.enabled_flag = 1 and fu.enabled_flag = 1 ) as demand_by, #{number, jdbcType = BIGINT}, #{deptFirstCount, jdbcType = INTEGER}, #{deptSecondCount, jdbcType = INTEGER}, #{deptThirdCount, jdbcType = INTEGER}, #{deptCurrentCount, jdbcType = INTEGER} , #{tempBeginDate, jdbcType = DATE}, #{tempEndDate, jdbcType = DATE}, #{afterCompleteEditFlag, jdbcType = BIT},#{agreeNum,jdbcType=INTEGER} from fnd_dept fd where fd.enabled_flag = 1 and fd.deleted_flag = 0 and fd.id = #{deptId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.update: update re_demand set enabled_flag = 0 where id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}

update re_demand set current_node = #{currentNode,jdbcType = VARCHAR}, demand_code = #{demandCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, dept_name = #{deptName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, office_name = #{officeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, team = #{team, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, dept_id = #{deptId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, demand_class = #{demandClass,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, past_quantity = #{pastQuantity,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, current_status = #{currentStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, recruitment_source = #{recruitmentSource,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, demand_reason = #{demandReason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, demand_by = #{demandBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, repeal_flag = #{repealFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, repeal_date = #{repealDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, repeal_reason = #{repealReason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, approval_result = #{approvalResult,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, oa_order = #{oaOrder,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, approval_date = #{approvalDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, demand_status = #{demandStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status_describes = #{statusDescribes,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, re_remake = #{reRemake,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, enabled_flag = #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, demand_reason_type = #{demandReasonType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, real_demand_status = #{realDemandStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, number = #{number, jdbcType = BIGINT}, dept_first_count = #{deptFirstCount, jdbcType = INTEGER}, dept_second_count = #{deptSecondCount, jdbcType = INTEGER}, dept_third_count = #{deptThirdCount, jdbcType = INTEGER}, dept_current_count = #{deptCurrentCount, jdbcType = INTEGER}, agree_num = #{agreeNum, jdbcType = INTEGER}, temp_begin_date = #{tempBeginDate, jdbcType = DATE}, temp_end_date = #{tempEndDate, jdbcType = DATE} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: order by (case when SUBSTRING(demand_code,1,1) = 'L' then SUBSTRING(demand_code,2,100)+0 else (demand_code+0) end ) DESC

select top 1
from re_demand rd where rd.demand_class = #{type, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and rd.enabled_flag = 1
and year(getdate()) = left(rd.demand_code, 4)
and 'L' + convert(varchar(4), YEAR ( getdate())) = LEFT ( rd.demand_code, 5 )
order by rd.id desc
mapper.update: update re_demand set status_describes = '已达成' where enabled_flag = 1 and id = #{id, jdbcType = BIGINT}
